# Daniel Short - Data Scientist

## Summary
- Domain focus: NLP, Computer Vision, ETL pipelines, and applied automation.
- Positioning: Outcome-focused data scientist delivering production systems, not prototype-only analyses.

## Measured Outcomes
- 500% KPI gains delivered on production initiatives.
- 200+ hours/year saved via workflow automation.
- 750% traffic lift on analytics-informed growth efforts.
- 24% reduction in retail loss through ETL + operational routing.

## Experience
- Visit Grand Junction
  - Built analytics-informed content/campaign workflows and reporting pipelines.
- Target
  - Built retail operations ETL/anomaly workflows tied to shrink and margin outcomes.

## Projects
- [retail-loss-etl]
  - Situation: fragmented loss signals delayed intervention.
  - Task: unify events into actionable operations data products.
  - Action: built ETL + alerting pipeline with centralized exception queue.
  - Result: 24% loss reduction.

- [edge-ai-handwriting-recognition]
  - Situation: server-dependent demo had cold starts.
  - Task: move inference local for speed/reliability.
  - Action: browser inference path with onnxruntime-web.
  - Result: sub-10ms target architecture and client-side execution.

- [computer-vision-document-restoration]
  - Situation: degraded/watermarked notation reduced usability.
  - Task: restore legibility while keeping musical structure.
  - Action: generative CV framing with before/after quality validation.
  - Result: cleaner reconstructed documents for downstream extraction.
